title: Allahabad High Court dismisses plea for sedition FIR against Rahul Gandhi
description: The Allahabad High Court on Friday dismissed a plea seeking the registration of a First Information Report (FIR) against Leader of Opposition Rahul Gandhi over his comment that he was in a “fight against the Indian State."A single-judge Bench comprising Justice Vikram D Chauhan has dismissed a plea challenging a trial court's refusal to order the registration of a criminal case against Rahul Gandhi in the matter.
